name: Lucky Loan
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>運</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>前</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まえ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>借</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>が</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>り
desc: Target 1 "Fortune Fairy" monster you control; Special Summon 1 Spellcaster monster from your hand or Deck, whose original Level is 1 lower than that monster's, also during your next turn after this card resolves, you cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters, except Spellcaster monsters. You can only activate 1 "Lucky Loan" per turn.
eff: Target 1 "Fortune Fairy" monster you control; Special Summon 1 Spellcaster monster from your hand or Deck, whose original Level is 1 lower than that monster's, also during your next turn after this card resolves, you cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters, except Spellcaster monsters. You can only activate 1 "Lucky Loan" per turn.

summoning: Restricts the player's Normal Summons to Type specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
